title: Table 1 in Montichneumon, a new genus of Ichneumoninae (Hymenoptera, Ichneumonidae) from the high mountains of Taiwan
author: Chen, Hsuan-Pu

description: Table 1.  PCR primers and conditions used in this study. Regarding PCR conditions, 35 cycles were run for  COI , whereas 30 cycles were run for  28S . Abbreviation: PCR= polymerase chain reaction. (1994)      Primer Mix F  LCO1490: Fol_Ich_F = 1:1        Primer Mix R  HCO2198: Fol_Ich_R = 1:1  This study     28S   (F)  GCGAACAAGTACCGTGAGGG        (R)  TAGTTCACCATCTTTCGGGTC  Laurenne  et al .
